Endpoints.Name: search-symbol
Endpoints.Description: Searches for best-matching symbols based on specified query and exchange.

Endpoints.Name: health-check
Endpoints.Description: Searches for best-matching symbols based on specified query.

Endpoints.Name: peers
Endpoints.Description: Returns peer ticker list for a symbol with optional grouping.

Endpoints.Name: financials-metric
Endpoints.Description: Returns basic-financials metric snapshot for a symbol.

Endpoints.Name: candle
Endpoints.Description: Returns OHLCV candles for a symbol over the given period and resolution.

Endpoints.Name: company-news
Endpoints.Description: Returns company news articles for a symbol over a UTC date range.

Endpoints.Name: news-sentiment
Endpoints.Description: Returns composite news sentiment snapshot for a symbol (premium).

Endpoints.Name: quote
Endpoints.Description: Returns real-time price snapshot for a symbol.

Endpoints.Name: profile
Endpoints.Description: Returns company profile snapshot for a symbol.

Endpoints.Name: calendar-earnings
Endpoints.Description: Returns scheduled corporate-earnings releases within a date window, optionally filtered by symbol.

Endpoints.Name: calendar-ipo
Endpoints.Description: Returns IPO listings within a date window. The upstream does not accept a symbol filter.

Endpoints.Name: calendar-economic
Endpoints.Description: Returns macro releases within a date window. The upstream does not accept a country filter (CalendarService applies it server-side).

Endpoints.Name: insider-transactions
Endpoints.Description: Returns insider transactions for a symbol within an optional date window.
